## What does this PR add?

[One sentence — what file did you create and where?]

## Why this role and project?

[One to two sentences — why does the content of your submission reflect genuine interest in the specific role and project you applied for? Do not copy from the README.]

## Self-check

Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] Branch name is exactly `screening/my-github-username`
- [ ] PR title follows the exact format: `[Screening] Full Name — Project Name — Role`
- [ ] My `.md` file is inside the `/submissions` folder
- [ ] My `.md` file contains all four required sections: Name, Project and Role, Expected Contribution, Question
- [ ] My Expected Contribution paragraph references the actual project — not generic statements
- [ ] My Question shows I read the project brief
- [ ] I am submitting before the 48-hour deadline
